content:
《艺术娱报》，只报猛料。

读者朋友们，你们是否思考过“真实与虚假”的问题：我们所看见的世界是真实的吗？

🖼️皮克曼先生宣扬自己的画有“进入真实”的魔力，他的同学██曾亲身见证：
*“食客交杯换盏，钻入胃袋大肆朵颐一番；
血肉酣畅蠕动，腥腐的陈酿正释放醇香；
世界浓墨重彩，每一幅面孔都狰狞绮丽。”*
……这畸形的世界本质……

小编为各位读者朋友争取到了几个珍贵的入画名额，机会难得，不要错过~
☎️**报名热线：**▼▼▼▼▼
💰️**报名费用：**限时折扣299坊

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Art & Scandal Gazette，we only break the big ones.

Dear readers, have you ever pondered the question of "truth and falsehood": Is the world we see real?

🖼️Mr. Pickman proclaims that his paintings possess the magic of "entering the truth," and his classmate ██ has witnessed it firsthand:
*"Guests clink glasses and exchange cups, indulging heartily in the feast.
The flesh writhes in ecstasy, and the stench of corruption from the aged brew releases a rich aroma;
The world is painted in vivid colors, each face is both grotesque and magnificent."*
...the essence of this distorted world...

The editor has secured a few precious spots for readers to enter the painting event. This is a rare opportunity, so don't miss out~
☎️**Registration Hotline:** ▼▼▼▼▼
💰️**Registration Fee:** Limited-Time Discount of 299 Florin
thread_title: V2.3.2 皮克曼情报3：探访画中世界，名额有限先到先得┊About Pickman: Explore the world within the painting
